title: Verification log initialized
summary: This file records all deep verification events for hypotheses discovered by the Autonomous Research Agent. Entries appended here include validated hypotheses, rejected hypotheses, and inconclusive verification attempts, with full scoring and reasoning.

fields_help.kind: Event type. One of: validated | rejected | verification_inconclusive | meta
fields_help.hypothesis_id: Unique ID of the hypothesis being evaluated
fields_help.title: Human-readable short name of the hypothesis
fields_help.description: Full summary of the verification result, reasoning, and any contradictions found
fields_help.verification_score: Final combined verification score after merging all sub-checks (0–1)

score_components.literature_check: Score + reasons produced from literature evidence retrieval and matching
score_components.critique_check: Score + reasons from cross-agent or swarm critique analysis
score_components.data_check: Score + reasons from dataset checks, computations, or simulations
score_components.consistency_check: Internal check for contradictions against memory, vector store, or domain constraints
score_components.novelty_check: Optional novelty measurement ensuring the hypothesis is not trivial or redundant

weighted_score_breakdown.method: How each score component is weighted

weights.data: Weight for computational or dataset checks

fields_help.run_id: Logical experiment run identifier (e.g., run_001, longevity_90day_01)
fields_help.domain: Domain associated with this hypothesis: longevity, math, biology, ai_safety, reparodynamics, general, etc.
fields_help.rye_effect: RYE impact of this verification. Positive indicates improved repair efficiency, negative indicates wasted energy
fields_help.delta_R: Change in the repair/stability score for this event
fields_help.energy_cost: Computed energy cost of the verification process inside TGRM's Repair–Verify phase
fields_help.agent_role: Role of the originating agent (researcher, critic, explorer, planner, integrator, swarm_n)
fields_help.agent_confidence: Internal confidence measure of the agent that produced the hypothesis
fields_help.cycle_index: Cycle number during which this hypothesis was logged

swarm_metadata.swarm_size: How many agents participated in the critique or verification vote

fields_help.source_links: Optional list of source URLs or citation IDs used in verification
fields_help.evidence_hash: Optional SHA-256 hash tying this verification to exact evidence (audit trail)
fields_help.notes: Extra human- or machine-readable details, debug info, or next-steps for downstream agents

audit.created_by: Name of module writing the event
audit.integrity_version: Version of integrity and anti-fabrication checks applied
